title: effect_util.c is the message-control (msgctrl) TU
body: The unit covering 0x80131630-0x80132690 was mis-attributed as 'effect_util' by the old campaign transplant — it is the text-engine escape-code handler TU. 76 table-proven msgctrl* names for its fn_ definitions are parked in config/GC6E01/symbolmap/msgctrl_ports.json (index-parallel port from XD's msgctrlcode table, 10/10 anchors validated). When working this file, apply those renames to the definitions you touch; the escape-code dispatch table is lbl_80363778 (95 entries, [param u32, handler ptr], consumer fn_800F98F4).
